name: taskasaurus
description: A status-bar task launcher strip for repositories with many tasks

taskasaurus.groupDelimiter.description: Character used to separate group names from task names (e.g., with '/', 'Test/unit' belongs to group 'Test').
taskasaurus.groupDelimiter.markdownDescription:
Character used to separate group names from task names.

With delimiter `/`, a task named `Test/unit` belongs to group `Test`.

**Common delimiters:** `/` (default), `:`, `.`, `|`

taskasaurus.shortChildLabels.description: When a group is expanded, strip the group prefix from child labels. E.g., 'Test/unit' shows as 'unit'.
taskasaurus.shortChildLabels.markdownDescription:
When a group is expanded, strip the group prefix from child labels.

**Example:** With group `Test`, the child `Test/unit` displays as `unit`.

Tooltips and sorting always use the full label.

**Default:** `true`

taskasaurus.groups.description: Per-group overrides. Each key is a group name, value is an object with 'shortLabel' (boolean).

taskasaurus.autoCollapseTimeout.description: Time in milliseconds before expanded groups auto-collapse. Set to 0 to disable auto-collapse.
taskasaurus.autoCollapseTimeout.markdownDescription:
Time in milliseconds before expanded groups automatically collapse.

**Default:** `10000` (10 seconds)

**Set to `0`** to disable auto-collapse entirely.
